title: Daily Memo: Iran Makes Preparations
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
New developments. Iran is stationing additional military personnel and air defense systems on Kharg Island in preparation for a possible U.S. ground operation, CNN reported, citing sources in U.S. intelligence. Iran has also reportedly placed anti-personnel and anti-tank mines around the island and on its coastline. Meanwhile, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi announced that Tehran […]

New developments. Iran is stationing additional military personnel and air defense systems on Kharg Island in preparation for a possible U.S. ground operation, CNN reported, citing sources in U.S. intelligence. Iran has also reportedly placed anti-personnel and anti-tank mines around the island and on its coastline. Meanwhile, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi announced that Tehran […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years.
